display_name: Agent Skills Standard — Best Practice Skill Collection
description: Collection of Agent Skills Standard and Best Practices by HoangNguyen0403 (324 stars). Multi-platform coverage: Android, Angular, Common (24 skills), Dart, Database (MongoDB/PostgreSQL/Redis), Flutter, Golang and more. AGENTS.md (64KB) defines mandatory skill-read-before-code protocol. Compatible with Antigravity, Copilot, and other AI agents.
author: HoangNguyen0403
protocol: AGENTS.md enforces: MUST read relevant SKILL.md before writing any code. Skill triggers based on file glob, task keywords, and tech stack. view_file on skill path is mandatory — matching a trigger is not enough.
notes: Copy skills/ into project .agent/skills/ or reference via .skillsrc. AGENTS.md defines when each skill must be loaded. Skills are versioned (e.g. typescript-v1.1.0, common-v1.7.0). Compatible agent list in .skillsrc: copilot, antigravity.
